description_cn:
垂直于每个三角形并与其面积成比例的力。

对每个三角形网格施加垂直方向的力，简单理解就是充气球效应。（四边形网格会自动按两个三角形网格计算）气压强度大于0且小于1时，网格体积变小；气压强度大于1时，网格体积增大。输入值为负数时，自动取绝对值。

与前面的体积运算器作用类似，只不过这个是通过调节气压强度调节压力的大小。
description_en:
A vertical force is applied to each triangular grid, which can be simply understood as the effect of inflating a balloon. (Quadrilateral grids will be automatically calculated as two triangular grids.) When the air pressure is greater than 0 and less than 1, the grid volume decreases; when the air pressure is greater than 1, the grid volume increases. When the input value is negative, the absolute value is automatically taken.

Similar to the volume calculator mentioned earlier, except that this one adjusts the pressure by regulating the air pressure intensity.
author: Kangaroo Team
